blocked.claimsIncomplete: Your SSO profile is incomplete and cannot create an account automatically
blocked.consumed: This link has already been used. Start SSO login again.
blocked.manualConflict: Your SSO identity matches multiple Octo accounts. Contact an administrator.

bind.createAccount: Create an Octo account with SSO
bind.loaderSub: Please wait. You will enter the app automatically.
bind.noMethod: Already have an Octo account? Use another method to link it.
bind.noMethodContact: No binding method is available. Contact {{contact}}.
bind.noMethodContactAdmin: No binding method is available. Contact an administrator.
bind.secondaryHint: Already have an Octo account? Verify with {{methods}} to link it.
bind.subtitle: Your SSO identity is not linked to an Octo account yet. Verify it to continue.
bind.title: Complete account linking

bindErrors.alreadyBound: This account is already linked. Return to login and start SSO again.
bindErrors.bindFailed: Binding failed. Start SSO login again.
bindErrors.claimsIncomplete: Your SSO profile is incomplete (missing email or phone) and cannot create an account automatically.
bindErrors.createAttempted: Account creation has already been attempted. Start SSO login again.
bindErrors.createConflict: Account information conflicts. Contact an administrator or return to login.
bindErrors.createFailed: Account creation failed. Start SSO login again.
bindErrors.createUnauthorized: This SSO identity is not allowed to create an account.
bindErrors.invalid: The link is invalid. Start login again.
bindErrors.network: Network error. Check your connection and try again.
bindErrors.expired: The link has expired. Start login again.
bindErrors.needVerify: Complete identity verification first. Start SSO login again.
bindErrors.retryLater: Too many attempts. Please try again later.
bindErrors.sendOtpFailed: Unable to send code. Try another verification method.
bindErrors.sendTooOften: Too many requests. Please try again later.
bindErrors.serviceUnavailable: Binding service is unavailable. Please try again later.
bindErrors.server: Service error. Please try again later.
bindErrors.tooManyRestart: Too many attempts. Start SSO login again.
bindErrors.verifyCodeInvalid: The code is incorrect or expired

download.androidHoverHint: Hover or click to view the Android download QR code
download.iosHoverHint: Hover or click to view the iOS installation QR code

login.defaultSub: Log in to your account to continue
login.passwordCta: Trouble logging in or new here?
login.ssoFlowHint: Login and registration continue on the unified authentication page.

oidc.network: Network error. Check your connection and try again.

feedback.addWords: Add another word or two. Uncommon words are better.
feedback.allUpper: All-uppercase is almost as easy to guess as all-lowercase.
feedback.avoidDates: Avoid dates and years associated with you.
feedback.capitalization: Capitalization does not help very much.
feedback.common10: This is a top-10 common password.
feedback.common100: This is a top-100 common password.
feedback.commonPassword: This is a very common password.
feedback.dates: Dates are often easy to guess.
feedback.keyboard: Straight rows of keys are easy to guess.
feedback.name: Names and surnames by themselves are easy to guess.
feedback.names: Common names and surnames are easy to guess.
feedback.noNeedSymbols: Symbols, digits, or uppercase letters are not always needed.
feedback.recentYears: Recent years are easy to guess.
feedback.repeats: Repeats like "aaa" are easy to guess.
feedback.repeatPattern: Repeated patterns are only slightly harder to guess.
feedback.reversed: Reversed words are not much harder to guess.
feedback.sequence: Sequences like abc or 6543 are easy to guess.
feedback.shortKeyboard: Short keyboard patterns are easy to guess.
feedback.similar: This is similar to a commonly used password.
feedback.substitution: Predictable substitutions like @ for a do not help much.
feedback.useWords: Use a few words and avoid common phrases.
feedback.word: A single word is easy to guess.

password.label: Password strength:
password.lengthMin: Password must be at least {{count}} characters
password.tooWeak: Password is too weak. Choose a stronger password.

qr.expired: QR code expired. Click to refresh.
qr.subtitle: A safer, faster login method
qr.tip: Open {{appName}} and scan the QR code
qr.title: QR login

register.hasAccount: Already have an account? Log in
register.title: Create account

reset.oidcHintPrefix: For enterprise SSO accounts, go to
reset.sub: Enter your registered email and we will send a code
reset.title: Reset password

serverErrorDisplays.sendTooOften: Too many requests. Please try again later.

validation.emailInvalidBeforeSend: Enter a valid email address first
validation.genericError: Operation failed. Please try again later.

welcome.chat1: Hi! I can help organize today's meeting notes 📝
welcome.chat2: Great, I sent you the meeting recording
welcome.chat3: Got it. Generating a summary now ⚡
